data.name: Oji-Mama/憧れのガチムチおじさんがボクだけのドスケベママになっちゃった❤
data.detailed_description:
大綱

「自己必須得自己解決。從以前就是這樣」

在黑心企業工作而筋疲力盡的星浦宗一，決定去鄉下進行療養。
負責照顧他的，是從小就有交往的叔父星浦獅志丸。

本以為能夠安心休息，但宗一卻不斷回想起令人不愉快的事情。
他感覺獅志丸的溫柔話語，也不過是表面的客套話，
於是宗一把獅志丸推開，要求他放手。

然而！獅志丸竟然準備好成為連陰莖都會照顧的淫蕩媽媽！
面對這樣出乎意料的情況，宗一雖然困惑，但與令人嚮往的叔父之間發生了許多色情的事情。

疲憊的心靈，由叔叔媽媽來療癒❤

看點

TTN所繪製的充滿魅力的角色！
由實力派繪師――TTN擔任本作的角色設計及原畫！
結實的叔叔溫柔的氣氛和壓倒性的肉感！請享受健壯而豐滿的性感。

完全沒有麻煩的系統！
大量的選項，各個結局迥然不同？特殊的通關條件？完全沒有這些要素！
本視覺小說遊戲旨在讓大家輕鬆享受色色場景及故事。

data.short_description: 「依賴別人，我怎麼可能做得到」 在黑心企業工作而筋疲力盡、決定在鄉下休養的青年，得到了一位既溫柔又結實的叔叔的支持。這位叔叔化身為媽媽，用他那充滿色情的療癒能力，撫慰了青年的身心！
data.supported_languages:
英文, 繁體中文, 日文*, 韓文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: Requires 64-bit processor and operating system
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

data.name: Oji-Mama/憧れのガチムチおじさんがボクだけのドスケベママになっちゃった❤
data.detailed_description:
Introduction

I have to do my best relying only on my own strength. It’s always been that way.

Souichi Hoshiura, worn out from working at a toxic company, ended up recuperating in the countryside.
Taking care of him is his uncle, Sisimaru Hoshiura, with whom he has been familiar since childhood.

Souichi thought he could relax and take it easy, but he can’t stop dwelling on past troubles.
He feels that Sisimaru’s kind words are just empty niceties, and pushes his uncle away, asking to be left alone.

But!
Sisimaru was ready to become a dirty mama who even took care of his dick!
Despite being perplexed by the unexpected turn of events, his days are filled with intimate moments with the uncle he has always admired.

Let Uncle Mama heal your weary heart♡

Point

Charming characters by TTN!
The character design and original drawings for this work are by the talented illustrator TTN!

Enjoy the gentle aura of a buff and burly uncle combined with an overwhelming sense of muscle and flesh!
Revel in the eroticism of being both ripped and voluptuous.

No complicated system at all!
A branching story with many choices? A full-blown challenge? There are no such elements!

Enjoy the eroticism and story in a casual way! is the concept of this simple, one-way novel game.

data.short_description: "Relying on someone else? That's just not possible." A young man, exhausted from working at a toxic company, decides to recuperate in the countryside. Supporting him is a kind and buff uncle. The uncle becomes a mama figure, healing the young man's body and soul with erotic healing powers!

English, Traditional Chinese, Japanese*, Korean
*languages with full audio support
